# MrPrompts — Build with AI. No dev background required.

> Frameworks, tools, and step-by-step guides for smart professionals who want to build with AI, not just read about it.

## About
MrPrompts is an AI training platform founded by Wayne Cederholm. We help non-technical professionals and enterprise leaders build with AI through guides, tools, workshops, and training programs. 4,000+ builders trust our weekly newsletter.

## Key Pages

### Build Tracks
- /build — Four build tracks: Knowledge Bases, Prompts, Workflows, Leadership
- /build/knowledge-bases — Build AI knowledge bases with Obsidian and CLAUDE.md
- /build/prompts — Build prompt frameworks and libraries by role
- /build/workflows — Build AI-powered automations and agent pipelines
- /build/leadership — Build AI-ready teams and organizations

### Free Guides
- /guides/your-first-wiki — Build your first AI knowledge base in 20 minutes
- /guides/claude-md-masterclass — Master the CLAUDE.md schema system
- /guides/prompt-library-starter — 20+ prompt templates for marketing, sales, ops, finance, HR, consulting
- /guides/workflow-blueprints — 5 pre-built AI workflow configurations
- /guides/ai-adoption-roadmap — 90-day AI rollout plan for organizations
- /guides/team-fluency-assessment — AI readiness scoring rubric and team survey

### Tools
- /tools/wiki-builder — AI-powered wiki vault generator (free)

### Products
- /products — Prompt packs, templates, workflow blueprints, leadership playbooks

### Workshops
- /workshops — Live, hands-on AI building sessions ($199-$249)

### Enterprise
- /enterprise — Custom AI training for organizations

### Blog
- /blog — Articles on prompt engineering, AI agents, workflows, and leadership

## Topics Covered
- Prompt engineering for non-technical professionals
- AI knowledge base architecture
- AI workflow automation
- AI adoption and change management for leaders
- AI agents and tools
- CLAUDE.md schema design
